/admin/content/files.reason: Defined by the 'files' view (display page_1, path admin/content/files). The view is currently DISABLED so no live route exists right now, but the view config exists, the File module is installed, and the path is under reserved /admin space. Enabling the view would reclaim it, so not a safe durable node alias.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Defined by the 'scheduler_scheduled_media' view (display overview, path admin/content/media/scheduled). Currently DISABLED so no live route, but the view config exists, the Scheduler module is installed, and the path is under reserved /admin space. Enabling the view would reclaim it, so not safe as a node alias.

/blog.reason: Already claimed by a path_alias entity: alias /blog -> /page/2 (a canvas_page entity, route entity.canvas_page.canonical). Additionally /blog/feed is a live Views RSS path (views blog:rss and projects:rss).

/moderated-content.reason: No route, no alias, no Views display. Content Moderation's 'Moderated content' view lives at /admin/content/moderated, not here, so this path is unclaimed and safe.

/search.reason: Claimed by a live route view.search.page from the enabled 'search' view (display page, path /search). The router resolves /search to this route, so a node alias would collide.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No router route, no path_alias entity, and no Views display claims this path. The router throws ResourceNotFoundException and path_alias.manager returns the path unchanged. Free to use as a node alias.
